## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Chore / dependency update

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo check --workspace` passes with zero errors
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --no-deps` passes with zero warnings
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` passes
- [ ] Public API is not broken (or this is a major version bump)
- [ ] No new dependencies added without discussion in an issue first
- [ ] Documentation updated (README, AGENTS.md) where relevant
- [ ] Changes are scoped — no unrelated files in this PR
